featuredArticle.title: The Dice Game and the Nature of Dharma
featuredArticle.excerpt: An examination of the pivotal dice game episode in the Mahabharata and what it reveals about the fluid, context-dependent nature of dharma in the epic's moral universe.
featuredArticle.author: Varun Gupta

seo.title: Articles on Mahabharata | Varun Gupta
